value.found_quote: The content your agent reads and writes is not recorded by default. These opt-in variables add content to the exported data
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Control sensitive data in exports" section that matches the claim exactly. It states that content the agent reads and writes is excluded from telemetry by default, and provides opt-in environment variables (OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS, OTEL_LOG_TOOL_DETAILS, OTEL_LOG_TOOL_CONTENT, OTEL_LOG_RAW_API_BODIES) to add content to exported data. This directly substantiates the claim about sensitive data control with opt-in variables.
